title: Lambda (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lambda''' is perhaps a letter of the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese alphabet]]. As a name it can refer to:

[[File:ImperialShuttle-DB.png|thumb|right|250px|A ''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]

*[[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]]

*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]
*[[Sev (Niner's squad)|Lambda Squad]]
*[[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]]
